title: cursor-ollama — Local Ollama for Cursor IDE
description: Open-source CLI by AYTRONIC CO to connect local Ollama models to Cursor IDE through Cloudflare Tunnel. Bearer auth, model name rewrite, and one-command setup.
author: AsherQelich SayyedMuhammadi
